items.title: Pirates Paul Skenes Loses No-Hitter In Seventh Inning Against Colorado Rockies
items.summary: Pirates ace Paul Skenes lost a no-hitter in the seventh inning on Tuesday night against the Colorado Rockies.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: New No. 2s after GT beat SRH: B Sai Sudharsan and Kagiso Rabada
items.summary: Prasidh Krishna and Jason Holder also moved up the Purple Cap tables after their many wickets in the GT vs SRH game in IPL 2026 on Tuesday
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: How Gerrard went from 'best night' to 'head like a box of frogs'
items.summary: Steven Gerrard inspired Liverpool's Champions League win in 2005 but just two months later wanted out. What happened?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
